Product.qualityDescription: Carefully crafted using the finest materials
Product.returnDescription: Return requests must be submitted by email to legal@ecommer.shop. Once received, Ecommer reviews the case according to applicable regulations and, if approved, forwards it to the seller to process the corresponding refund.
Product.trackDescription: Yes. Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a notification. You can also check the status of your purchase at any time from your account on the platform.
Product.shippingCostDescription: Shipping costs are calculated automatically based on the distance between the seller's store and your delivery address. You will see the exact amount before confirming your purchase.
Product.deliveryDescription: Orders in Popayán are delivered by MESSENGER. Once you complete your purchase, the system automatically notifies the courier to pick up the package from the seller's store and bring it straight to your door.
Product.paymentMethods: What payment methods can I use?
Product.paymentDescription: We accept all payment methods: credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PSE (any bank), Nequi, Daviplata, and banking correspondents. Choose the one that works best for you at checkout.
Product.paymentSecurity: Is it safe to pay on the platform?
Product.paymentSecurityDescription: Completely safe. All payments are processed through Wompi, certified with PCI-DSS — the most rigorous international security standard for banking data, the same level used by traditional banking systems. Your information is encrypted and never exposed.
Product.invoice: Will I receive an invoice for my purchase?
Product.invoiceDescription: Yes. Sellers enabled on the platform issue electronic invoices validated by the DIAN (Colombian Tax Authority), so you will receive a legal proof of purchase directly.
Product.support: How do I get help if I have a problem?
Product.supportDescription: You can reach our customer support team at 314 851 8961. An AI Bot will initially assist you and redirect you to a real advisor if needed. You can also email us at legal@ecommer.shop for return-related inquiries.

sellersCta.title: Want to sell with us?
sellersCta.description: Visit the sellers view and discover how to create your store, manage products, and scale your sales in minutes.

About.title: About Us
About.description: We connect entrepreneurs and merchants from the region with their customers. No complications. No technological barriers. With Cauca pride.
About.history: Ecommer was born from a concrete observation: while large companies dominate digital commerce, most Colombian micro-entrepreneurs remain on the sidelines. Fragmented tools, high costs, technical barriers, and a market where 96% of businesses in Cauca are micro-enterprises, with over 56% operating informally. There was no solution built for them. We decided to build it.
About.mission: To empower Colombian micro-entrepreneurs with accessible, integrated, and scalable e-commerce technology — so they can sell online with the same power as big brands.
About.vision: To be the reference platform for digital commerce for MSMEs in LATAM — enabling thousands of local businesses to digitize their sales, scale their operations, and connect with customers on any channel. We start in Popayán. We scale by metrics, not by maps.

audience.title: Who we serve
audience.description: If you have a business in Popayán or any municipality in Cauca, Ecommer is your platform. Create your store in minutes, upload your products, and reach more customers without needing technical knowledge.
audience.cta: I want to sell on Ecommer

leadership.label: Leadership
leadership.serverLead: William Fernando Sevilla Palechor — Server Lead
leadership.eiaLead: Juan Carlos Martínez Fernández — EIA Lead

location.title: Where we are
location.text: Ecommer operates from Popayán, Cauca, Colombia.

differentiators.title: Why we are different
differentiators.description: Ecommer is not just another e-commerce tool. It is an integration and orchestration company: we combine the best market providers (Vendure, Wompi, Clerk, Azure, DIAN) into a unified experience, adapted to the Colombian context.
differentiators.simetria: SimetrIA — our own AI agent that sells from WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook, without taking the buyer out of the chat.
differentiators.messenger: Messenger as preferred partner — access to 15,000+ monthly deliveries in Popayán from day one.
differentiators.compliance: Native compliance — PCI DSS, DIAN (Resolution 0227/2025), Law 1581, Consumer Statute — built in by default, not as an add-on.
differentiators.incentives: Incentive-aligned model — the platform only earns when the seller sells.

q1.q: Is it really free for 3 months?
q1.a: Yes. For the first 3 months you pay no monthly fee for using the platform. The only cost you assume are the transaction fees, which are charged directly by our payment gateway Wompi.

q2.q: What do I need to register as a seller?
q2.a: You only need your email address. If you want to operate as a company, you can add your tax information later.

q3.q: Is it safe? My customer is afraid to enter their card.
q3.a: Absolutely. Payments on Ecommer are processed through Wompi, a gateway certified with PCI-DSS, the most demanding international security standard. Your customers' information is encrypted and never exposed.

q4.q: Do I need to know how to code to use Ecommer?
q4.a: Not at all. If you know how to use Facebook or WhatsApp, you know how to use Ecommer. Uploading a product is as easy as uploading a photo to Instagram.

q5.q: What is the Digital Certificate and why does it cost $199,900 COP?
q5.a: It is your digital signature before DIAN — the legal mechanism that validates your electronic invoices in Colombia. Without it, your invoices have no tax validity. You can purchase it annually for $199,900 COP or in monthly installments with a commitment period.

cta.title: Ready to be part of Cauca's digital commerce?
cta.register: Register your store and start selling

hero.title: Your shopping experience,
hero.description: Find products from Colombian entrepreneurs, make secure payments and receive your order right at your door. All in one place.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ecommer
welcome.description: Ecommer is a marketplace designed to connect buyers with thousands of products offered by different companies, businesses and vendors in one place. Our platform allows you to discover, compare and buy products easily, quickly and securely, providing a modern shopping experience backed by technology, artificial intelligence and automated processes.
welcome.free: Shopping at Ecommer is completely free. There are no costs to register, browse the platform or make a purchase. The only additional cost that may apply is the shipping cost, which depends on the buyer's location, the seller and the rates set by our logistics operators.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.description: At Ecommer we work with Wompi, one of the main payment processing platforms in Colombia, developed by Bancolombia, which complies with high security standards to protect our users' financial information.
payments.intro: Thanks to this integration you can make your purchases using different payment methods, including:

methods.cards: Visa, Mastercard and American Express credit cards
methods.pse: Payments from bank accounts through PSE
methods.others: Other payment methods enabled by Wompi depending on availability

payments.security: All payment information is processed directly by Wompi through secure and encrypted connections, so Ecommer never stores complete data of your cards or bank accounts.

local.title: Local shipping
local.description: For deliveries within Popayán, Ecommer works with Messenger, one of the leading delivery companies in the city, recognized for its speed, coverage and efficiency in product delivery.
local.benefit: Thanks to this alliance, local orders can be managed agilely, allowing us to reduce delivery times and offer better tracking throughout the entire process.

national.title: National shipping
national.description: For shipments to the rest of the country, Ecommer is integrated with Envia.com, a technological platform specialized in logistics that connects multiple national and international carrier companies from a single integration.
national.benefit: This technology allows to automatically calculate shipping rates, generate guides, track packages and select the most convenient carrier according to the destination and order conditions, providing a more efficient and transparent logistics experience.

factors.title: The shipping cost will depend on factors such as:
factors.weight: Weight and dimensions of the package
factors.rates: Current rates from our logistics operators

tracking.title: Order tracking
tracking.description: Once your purchase is confirmed, you will be able to fully track your order directly from your account on the platform.
tracking.intro: During the process you can check statuses such as:
tracking.national: For national shipments made with Envia.com, you will receive a tracking number that will allow you to track the status of your package in real time through the assigned carrier. You will be able to check detailed information such as current location, transit events, delivery attempts, and estimated arrival date. Envia's system integrates multiple national carriers, giving you full visibility from the moment the package leaves the warehouse until it arrives at your door.

support.title: Intelligent support 24/7
support.description: At Ecommer we have SimetrIA, our artificial intelligence agent available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
support.intro: SimetrIA is designed to help you immediately with queries related to:
support.human: If during the conversation SimetrIA identifies that your request requires personalized attention, it will connect you with one of the advisors from the Ecommer team so you can receive human assistance in a timely manner.
support.combination: This way we combine the speed of artificial intelligence with the support of our team when necessary.

security.title: Security in your purchases
security.description: The security of our users is a priority.
security.intro: That's why Ecommer incorporates different technologies to protect every purchase made on the platform, including:

features.processes: Technological processes that seek to guarantee a reliable shopping experience

howToBuy.title: How to buy?
howToBuy.description: Buying at Ecommer is very simple:

steps.step1: Search for the product you want
steps.step2: Review the information, availability and price
steps.step3: Add it to the shopping cart
steps.step8: Track the status of your order until delivery

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.description: At Ecommer we work to offer a modern, secure shopping experience backed by technology. We integrate reliable electronic payments, logistics solutions for local and national deliveries, artificial intelligence to provide permanent support and a platform that makes it easy to find products from different sellers in one place.
commitment.goal: Our goal is for every purchase to be a simple, transparent and reliable process, allowing you to shop with peace of mind while we take care of the technology that makes the whole experience possible.

benefits.title: Why shop at Ecommer?
benefits.subtitle: We buy local. We support local.

payments.title: 100% secure payments
payments.description: Processed by Wompi (Bancolombia), PCI-DSS certified. Your information is never exposed.

delivery.title: Home delivery
delivery.description: MESSENGER picks up from the seller's store and brings it to your door. Real-time tracking.

invoice.title: Electronic invoice
invoice.description: Sellers issue invoices validated by the DIAN. You receive legal proof of your purchase.

support.title: Customer support
support.description: Support available at 314 851 8961. A real agent is one step away if you need them.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before buying.

q1.a: Return requests must be submitted by email to legal@ecommer.shop. Once received, Ecommer reviews the case according to applicable regulations and, if approved, forwards it to the seller to process the corresponding refund.

q2.a: Yes. Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a notification. You can also check the status of your purchase at any time from your account on the platform.

q3.a: Shipping costs are calculated automatically based on the distance between the seller's store and your delivery address. You will see the exact amount before confirming your purchase.

q4.a: Orders in Popayán are delivered by MESSENGER. Once you complete your purchase, the system automatically notifies the courier to pick up the package from the seller's store and bring it straight to your door.

q5.q: What payment methods can I use?
q5.a: We accept all payment methods: credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PSE (any bank), Nequi, Daviplata, and banking correspondents. Choose the one that works best for you at checkout.

q6.q: Is it safe to pay on the platform?
q6.a: Completely safe. All payments are processed through Wompi, certified with PCI-DSS — the most rigorous international security standard for banking data, the same level used by traditional banking systems. Your information is encrypted and never exposed.

q7.q: Will I receive an invoice for my purchase?
q7.a: Yes. Sellers enabled on the platform issue electronic invoices validated by the DIAN (Colombian Tax Authority), so you will receive a legal proof of purchase directly.

q8.q: How do I get help if I have a problem?
q8.a: You can reach our customer support team at 314 851 8961. An AI Bot will initially assist you and redirect you to a real advisor if needed. You can also email us at legal@ecommer.shop for return-related inquiries.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect to start your digital transformation

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We resolve your operational doubts so you can scale with confidence.

gratis.question: Is the platform really free to use?
gratis.answer: Yes. The only cost is the payment gateway fees (Wompi): 7.9% per transaction, covering credit cards, PSE, and bank correspondents. If you need additional features, you can check our plans.

tecnicos.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use the platform?
tecnicos.answer: Not at all. If you know how to use WhatsApp or Instagram, you know how to use Ecommer. Uploading a product is as easy as posting a photo on social media.

cobro.question: How and when do I receive the money from my sales?
cobro.answer: You receive the money every 15 days. If you use Nequi, Bancolombia, or a bank with a registered BRE-B key, there are no additional costs. If you choose another bank without a key, the transaction costs are assumed by the store.

envios.question: How do shipments work in Popayán?
envios.answer: We have an alliance with MESSENGER. When you receive an order, the system automatically notifies them to pick up the package at your location and deliver it to the customer. The shipping cost is assumed by the buyer and is calculated based on distance.

facturacion.question: Is electronic invoicing mandatory?
facturacion.answer: Not to start. If you are a natural person in a non-IVA responsible regime, you can sell without electronic invoicing. Legal entities are required by law. For them, we offer the electronic invoicing service with DIAN Digital Certificate from $199,900/year.

contabilidad.question: Does Ecommer help me with accounting?
contabilidad.answer: Yes. The platform records all your sales and generates ready-to-download reports, so your accountant doesn't have to do extra work. We meet the standards to keep you up to date with DIAN effortlessly.

proteccion.question: How do they protect my money against claims or chargebacks?
proteccion.answer: Wompi monitors payments 24/7 and money can only be withdrawn with a second key. In case of claims for physical product sales, they notify you and you have 7 days to prove delivery. We recommend keeping all sales documentation for at least one year.

atencion.question: Is there a customer service number?
atencion.answer: Yes, we have a customer service number. You can contact us at 314 851 8961, where we will gladly assist you. Initially, the support connects you with an AI Bot which redirects you to a real assistant if necessary.

cta.title: Ready to take your business to the next level?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Colombian manufacturers who are already exporting and selling more with Ecommer.
